title: Platform Engineering — Q3 2026 Retro
body: Quarterly engineering retrospective
Presented to: Eng org + leadership
Prepared by: Platform Team

title: Velocity Metrics
body: Story points shipped: 412 (target 380, +8%)
Deploy frequency: 34 deploys/week (up from 21/week in Q2)
Lead time for changes: 4.2 hours (down from 11 hours in Q2)
Change failure rate: 3.1% (target under 5%)
Mean time to recovery: 22 minutes (target under 30 min)

title: Incidents & Postmortems
body: Total incidents this quarter: 6 (down from 11 in Q2)
Sev-1: 1 incident — payment webhook queue backup, Aug 14, 47 min downtime
Sev-2: 2 incidents — auth token expiry bug, database connection pool exhaustion
Root cause pattern: 4 of 6 incidents traced to insufficient load testing before release
Action taken: mandatory load-test gate added to release checklist starting Q4

title: Shipped Features
body: Real-time collaboration engine — launched to 100% of users Aug 3
New onboarding flow — reduced time-to-first-value from 12 min to 4 min
Mobile offline mode — now supports 30-day offline sync
Admin audit log — SOC 2 compliance requirement, shipped 2 weeks early
API v3 — breaking change migration, 92% of customers migrated by quarter end

title: Tech Debt & Infrastructure
body: Legacy monolith decomposition: 6 of 14 services extracted (43% complete)
Test coverage: raised from 61% to 74% across core services
Build time: cut from 18 minutes to 6 minutes via cache restructuring
Deprecated Node 16 across all services — now standardized on Node 22
Database migration to sharded Postgres: 2 of 5 shards live

title: Team Growth
body: Headcount: grew from 24 to 31 engineers this quarter
New hires: 5 backend, 2 platform/SRE
Promotions: 3 engineers promoted to senior, 1 to staff
Engineering NPS (internal survey): 68, up from 54 last quarter
"This is the first quarter where on-call actually felt sustainable." — anonymous eng survey response

title: Q4 OKRs
body: Objective: Achieve 99.95% platform uptime — currently at 99.91%
Objective: Cut infrastructure cost per active user by 20%
Objective: Complete monolith decomposition to 80% (from 43%)
Objective: Ship real-time analytics dashboard for enterprise tier
Objective: Reduce median PR review time from 18 hours to under 6 hours
